peekOfCode:
def download_video(c: Client, m: Message):
    file = c.download_media(m, in_memory=True)
    fs.put("video/" + file.name, file.getvalue())
    s3.upload_fileobj(
        Fileobj=file,
        Bucket="storage",
        Key="video/" + file.name,
        ExtraArgs={"ACL": "public-read", "ContentType": "video/mp4"},
    )
    print(f"Uploaded {file.name} to {file.name}")
